---
title: "Home"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/serena-128
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:samhin.eme12345@gmail.com
---

## Welcome

Hi, I’m Serena Emedeke.

This is my ePortfolio where I showcase my projects, skills, and learning journey.
